commands.review_summary:
The PR removes `mentionTargets` from Feishu outbound reply dispatch, rewrites mentioned-user prompt context, adds no-auto-mention regression tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection against current main: Feishu captures `ctx.mentionTargets`, passes them into `createFeishuReplyDispatcher`, and the dispatcher forwards them into first text/card/fallback sends and streaming-card close. I did not run a live Feishu scenario.
commands.review_followup: This needs Feishu owner/author revision and contributor-provided real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's live Feishu setup proof or settle the explicit mention semantics safely.

commands.review_summary:
The PR prefixes Telegram’s native `/think` picker with the current thinking level, threads session/default thinking state into that title, updates tests, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main formats the Telegram `/think` picker without current-level text even though `/think` without an argument is documented to show the current level. I did not run a live Telegram bot in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and a small resolver-order fix before normal maintainer review can proceed.
